title: tilia × viridis
intro: Tilia × viridis, also known as the lime tree or green-leaved linden, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Tilia platyphyllos and Tilia cordata. The medicinal properties of Tilia × viridis include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects, which make it a popular remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress levels, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Tilia × viridis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
